title: F는 이해불가
text: Sorry, I waited a long time. Why are you late? The traffic was a bit backed up on my way out. But, Oppa, why did you wear that? Uh, why does it look weird? Uh, yeah, it looks like an old man. Is it because I'm an old man myself? Maybe. What do you mean by cute? My neck hurts. Didn't you go to the doctor? I didn't have time on a weekday last week. Then if you're sick today, just rest at home. I guess I should just buy it. I don't think it's that bad. Yeah, go to the doctor. I'll go get some coffee. Are we fighting? Are we fighting? Hello? Uh, Jin-ah. Uh, I said I got a perm. OMG. Send me a picture. How much did it cost? Your hair is long, so it must have cost a lot. Uh. [Music] Okay, hang up. Why? She said she got a perm because she was depressed. Yeah, I should have told her to send a picture. I did, but she hung up saying she'd call back later. She must be busy. I guess so. That's not it. Why? No, I'm looking at the photos I took, and why have I gained so much weight? [Music] I'm not sure right now if this is just bloating from eating something salty or if I've actually gained weight. I didn't eat with Jjanggu. Yeah, give me your hand. I've lost about 2kg. [Music] What should we do today? Uh, I haven't thought about it. Shall we watch a movie? Should we? Really? No, you're cute. [Music] Why, at work? I got a KakaoTalk message. "Work, work." "Why? You were late last week, so don't be late this week." But you did stay up a bit late last week. [Music] Because they work and come to work just the same, so if a junior always came in later than me, I think I'd be angry too. Oh my god, we're really going to fight. That's true. Yeah, I used to spend a lot of time on it too. But since I exercise the night before, I'm fine the next day. I'll exercise with you. I like that you listen so well. I just came back from the vet. "Yeah, let's go now." "Why? It's not time for the movie yet." "I made a vet appointment." "I thought you'd say you don't have time on a weekday again." "Oh, right. Yeah, it's on the 3rd floor." "Okay. Thanks." [Music] Cute.
